final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing single-page knowledge card illustration for children about the story of 赤壁之战 (Battle of Red Cliffs) from 三国.

Style/medium: needs a children's cartoon / illustrated storybook aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a single large knowledge card layout with a clear title at top, key story bullet points listed and labeled on the side, and the main card area unfolding the story in cartoon narrative panels
Subject: must include the 赤壁之战 story with key figures (曹操, 刘备, 孙权, 诸葛亮, 周瑜) and the iconic fire-on-the-river battle scene
Scene/backdrop: must include the 长江 river setting with warships and fire as the central visual backdrop
Lighting/mood: needs a dramatic yet child-friendly warm atmosphere — exact light and mood treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a vivid, child-friendly direction — exact color choices are yours
Materials/textures: needs a cartoon illustration surface feel — exact line weight and texture are yours
Text (verbatim): must include "赤壁之战" (large, primary title); side bullet points listing key story beats in Chinese (e.g. 曹操南下 / 孙刘联军 / 借东风 / 火烧赤壁 / 曹操败走)
Constraints: must preserve single-card format; bullet points must be visually separated and clearly labeled alongside the main illustration area; content must be age-appropriate for children
Avoid: must avoid overly violent or graphic depictions; avoid adult-complexity layout
